text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I would like permission to undergo a
special training journey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we have no races or photo shoots
today, Sakura Chiyono O comes up to me in her
signature racewear to make a puzzling request.
choice_data_list: Why do you want to do that?
Why do you want to do that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Because I want to become a lady who embodies
traditional Japanese ideals!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I asked for my signature racewear to be designed
with Japanese aesthetics and a cherry blossom
motif...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But I'm not very ladylike... or samurai-like...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I like Japanese desserts and sumo wrestling, but
just liking them doesn't make me worthy of
wearing my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want the Yamato Nadeshiko Squad
to put me through my paces!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Grass and Yaeno, I mean! I always think of
them as being super refined, so I call them the
Yamato Nadeshiko Squad.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that between the two of them, they can
make me into a proper Japanese lady!
choice_data_list: You don't need to go that far...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But I want to go that far!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Putting on my signature racewear reminds me of
how I felt when I entered the academy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I stepped through the gates so proud and sure
that this would be the place I'd explode into full
bloom...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My signature racewear is the embodiment of that
wish I made, so I want to wear it with confidence!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And once I have that confidence, I'm sure I'll truly
blossom in it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the idea still comes off a little strange, her
intentions are good, so I set aside time in her
schedule for her to do her special training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, I wanted to ask...Which of them
do you think I should ask for help? Grass or
Yaeno?
choice_data_list:
Ask Grass Wonder, the epitome of Japanese
grace and beauty.
Ask Yaeno Muteki, the disciplined warrior.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Grass's way of speaking and mannerisms
are so precise and wonderful. I wish I could be
like her... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: E... excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for agreeing to help me, Grass! Now,
as for today's training, what were you—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky, the Beast.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You and I are both chasing after the same great
opponent.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But is that blade of yours sharpened? Allow me to
test your abilities!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gyahhh?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You seemed so nervous, so I decided to
play a little prank on you to lighten the mood.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-oh, I see! So that was a joke!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Haha. That surprised me. I should have known you
weren't that scary.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I heard you like Japanese desserts, so I
thought we could have some with green tea. Now,
shall we talk?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I too am still on my journey to become a proper
Japanese lady, so let us discuss the methods by
which we can achieve our ideals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They indulge in desserts and tea... Or rather, they
hold a tea ceremony under Grass Wonder's
tutelage and pass the time tranquilly.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Why, good morning to you, my dear Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh, my, do you think so? Perhaps I've
gotten closer to being a proper Japanese lady. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What do you say we go visit some shrines and
temples sometime? Grass informed me of some
nice ones we can go see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the easily influenced Sakura Chiyono O
seems to have picked up on Grass Wonder's way
of speaking. It sticks with her for quite a while
after their meeting.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno! I'm sure training with her won't be easy,
but I'll just have to come prepared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm still inexperienced myself and am in no
position to teach you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I understand well your desire for
strength. As such, I shall instruct you to the best
of my abilities.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Strength... Yes, that's right! Thank you for
agreeing to help me. Let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Before we engage in our training, we must
thoroughly wipe down the space we are about to
use in order to show appreciation for it...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Let us go over the floors one hundred times.
Surely then they will be clean.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Pant... We're finished!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Well done. Now, about the actual
training...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Before we start it, let's do a hundred punches to
get your body accustomed to the exercise.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyah, hyah... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wheeeze! Huff... A... a hundred punches... done!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: A wonderful job. Now, as for the actual training...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: We will not be doing any.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! We're calling it quits already?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Does this mean... there's no hope for me?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Quite the opposite. You did well today, so I see
no need for training. You are already plenty
strong.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What? Strong? Me? But I'm so out of breath.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The strength I speak of is your mental fortitude.
Within your heart is the resilience to keep
pushing yourself to be who you want to be...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Once you realize that for yourself, you will be
able to walk with confidence without having to
learn from someone like me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The world of martial arts is one fraught with
dangers, but if you truly wish to enter it... do not
hesitate to reach out to me again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Should that time ever come, I shall welcome you
with open arms. Thank you very much for today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No, thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O bows smartly, the profile of her
face shining with a little more confidence than
before.
